description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a prominent front porch supported by columns and a wide staircase leading up to the entrance. The exterior walls are primarily white with a brick base trim, and the roof is flat with a dark overhang above the porch. Large windows are distributed across the facade and sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The rear section includes a sunroom or enclosed patio with a glass roof, and the overall structure is rectangular with a modern, open floor plan. The building appears to be constructed from a combination of concrete, brick, glass, and metal, with interior spaces visible through the windows. The design is clean and contemporary, suitable for an urban residential neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a wide front porch, flat roof, brick trim, and large windows, featuring a sunroom at the rear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide staircase, covered porch with columns, and main entrance flanked by large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended porch roof, side windows, and the sunroom with a glass roof at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the sunroom structure, flat roof, and a mix of solid and windowed walls.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, the sunroom, and the continuation of the brick base trim.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
